allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(security\): address critical vulnerabilities from code review

- Fix IMAP/SMTP auth: use bcrypt instead of direct hash comparison
- Fix CORS: validate Origin instead of allowing wildcard
- Fix recovery key: pass via HttpOnly cookie instead of URL parameter
- Add message ownership check to prevent reading other users'' messages
- Add rate limiting middleware \(5 req/min\) for auth endpoints
- Enable Secure cookie flag in production
- Add crypto module for future password encryption
- Update CLAUDE.md with project conventions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(ssh lucky@jwebhelp.ru "cd /home/mailserver/ddmailserver && git pull origin main && make build && sudo systemctl stop mailserver && sudo cp build/mailserver /usr/local/bin/mailserver && sudo systemctl start mailserver && echo ''Deploy complete!''")
Bash(ssh lucky@jwebhelp.ru "find /home -name ''ddmailserver'' -type d 2>/dev/null || find / -name ''mailserver'' -type d 2>/dev/null | head -5")

Bash(ssh lucky@jwebhelp.ru "cd /opt/ddmailserver && git pull origin main && make build && sudo systemctl stop mailserver && sudo cp build/mailserver /usr/local/bin/mailserver && sudo systemctl start mailserver && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl status mailserver --no-pager")

Bash(ssh lucky@jwebhelp.ru "sudo systemctl stop mailserver && sudo cp /tmp/mailserver /usr/local/bin/mailserver && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/mailserver && sudo systemctl start mailserver && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl status mailserver --no-pager")

Bash(ssh lucky@jwebhelp.ru "sudo systemctl stop mailserver; sudo cp /tmp/mailserver /usr/local/bin/mailserver; sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/mailserver; sudo systemctl start mailserver; sleep 3; sudo systemctl status mailserver --no-pager -l | head -20")
Bash(ssh lucky@jwebhelp.ru "sudo journalctl -u mailserver --since ''1 minute ago'' --no-pager | grep -i cors")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(cors\): support reverse proxy with X-Forwarded-Host

CORS middleware now checks X-Forwarded-Host header for proper origin
validation behind nginx/reverse proxy setups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
